dialogueLines.text: ...It looks like he's arguing with someone, do you know who that is?

choices.text: Dunno. Didn't care much for his story. Still don't.

dialogueLines.text: So that's the friend he was mourning in The Graveyard, you should see why they're arguing...
That's his friend he was mourning in The Graveyard, Derry. Go figure out why they're arguing with each other.
